steps.name: Add TIFF files
steps.text: Drag TIFF files onto the drop zone or click to select.

steps.name: Convert
steps.text: Click convert. PNG is lossless - no quality setting needed.

steps.name: Download PNG
steps.text: Download files individually or all at once.

items.title: 3. Ληψη

items.title: Privacy
items.description: Files stay on your device. Nothing is uploaded.

items.title: No limits
items.description: Convert as many files as you need.

items.title: Bulk download
items.description: Download all files with one click.

items.question: TIFF → PNG?
items.answer: Μετατρεψτε αρχεια TIFF σε PNG χωρις απωλειες. Διατηρηση ποιοτητας σαρωσεων.

items.question: Server upload?
items.answer: No. Everything runs locally in your browser. Files never leave your device.

items.question: Multiple files?
items.answer: Yes. Add as many files as you like. No limits.

contentBlocks.title: Βοηθηστε μας να βελτιωσουμε τα εργαλεια
contentBlocks.description: Εχετε μια ιδεα, βρηκατε σφαλμα ή θελετε να προτεινετε λειτουργια; Γραψτε μας - απανταμε εντος 24 ωρων.
